inputs.label: Scale Length
inputs.businessContext: The distance from the nut to the bridge, representing the vibrating length of the string. Standard mandolin scale length is around 330 mm.

businessContext_i18n.en: The distance from the nut to the bridge, representing the vibrating length of the string. Standard mandolin scale length is around 330 mm.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Somundan köprüye olan mesafe, telin titreşen uzunluğunu temsil eder. Standart mandolin skalası uzunluğu yaklaşık 330 mm'dir.

inputs.label: String Diameter
inputs.businessContext: The diameter of the string in millimeters. Typical mandolin strings range from 0.2 mm to 0.4 mm.

businessContext_i18n.en: The diameter of the string in millimeters. Typical mandolin strings range from 0.2 mm to 0.4 mm.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Telin milimetre cinsinden çapı. Tipik mandolin telleri 0,2 mm ile 0,4 mm arasında değişir.

inputs.label: Material Density
inputs.businessContext: The density of the string material in kilograms per cubic meter. Common values are 7800 for steel, 6500 for titanium, 1840 for nylon.

businessContext_i18n.en: The density of the string material in kilograms per cubic meter. Common values are 7800 for steel, 6500 for titanium, 1840 for nylon.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tel malzemesinin metreküp başına kilogram cinsinden yoğunluğu. Yaygın değerler çelik için 7800, titanyum için 6500, naylon için 1840'tır.

inputs.label: Note Frequency
inputs.businessContext: The desired fundamental frequency of the string in Hertz. G3 (the lowest standard mandolin string) is 196 Hz.

businessContext_i18n.en: The desired fundamental frequency of the string in Hertz. G3 (the lowest standard mandolin string) is 196 Hz.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Telin Hertz cinsinden istenen temel frekansı. G3 (standart mandolinin en düşük teli) 196 Hz'dir.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
